---
title: "The Impact of VAAs on (non-Voting) Aspects of Political Participation: Insights from Panel Data Collected During the 2017 German Elections Campaign"
author: "Manavopoulos, V., Triga, V., Marschall, S., and Wurthmann, C."
date: 2019-01-01
description: "Statistics, Policy and Politics, 9(2), 105–134"
doi: "10.1515/spp-2018-0008"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/journal-article.png
---

**Link:** [https://doi.org/10.1515/spp-2018-0008](https://doi.org/10.1515/spp-2018-0008)
